positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for hydrocarbon_premise_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(m)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~is_chemical_compound(m)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~is_chemical_compound(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    is_mixture(m)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define is_organic_compound(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define is_hydrocarbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define contains_carbon(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define is_alkane(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for hydrocarbon_premise_negative
% SZS output start Proof for hydrocarbon_premise_negative
1. ! [X0] : (is_hydrocarbon(X0) => is_organic_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (is_alkane(X0) => is_hydrocarbon(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (is_organic_compound(X0) => is_chemical_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0] : (is_chemical_compound(X0) => ~contains_only_one_element(X0)) [input(axiom)]
6. is_mixture(m) => (is_chemical_compound(m) <=> contains_only_one_element(m)) [input(axiom)]
7. is_mixture(m) [input(axiom)]
8. ~(is_alkane(m) & contains_carbon(m)) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~~(is_alkane(m) & contains_carbon(m)) [negated conjecture 8]
10. is_alkane(m) & contains_carbon(m) [flattening 9]
11. is_alkane(m) [pure predicate removal 10]
13. ! [X0] : (is_organic_compound(X0) | ~is_hydrocarbon(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
14. ! [X0] : (is_hydrocarbon(X0) | ~is_alkane(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
15. ! [X0] : (is_chemical_compound(X0) | ~is_organic_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
16. ! [X0] : (~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~is_chemical_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
17. (is_chemical_compound(m) <=> contains_only_one_element(m)) | ~is_mixture(m) [ennf transformation 6]
18. ((is_chemical_compound(m) | ~contains_only_one_element(m)) & (contains_only_one_element(m) | ~is_chemical_compound(m))) | ~is_mixture(m) [nnf transformation 17]
19. ~is_hydrocarbon(X0) | is_organic_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
20. ~is_alkane(X0) | is_hydrocarbon(X0) [cnf transformation 14]
21. ~is_organic_compound(X0) | is_chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 15]
22. ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~is_chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 16]
23. contains_only_one_element(m) | ~is_chemical_compound(m) | ~is_mixture(m) [cnf transformation 18]
25. is_mixture(m) [cnf transformation 7]
26. is_alkane(m) [cnf transformation 11]
27. contains_only_one_element(m) | ~is_chemical_compound(m) [forward subsumption resolution 23,25]
29. ~is_chemical_compound(m) [forward subsumption resolution 27,22]
31. is_hydrocarbon(m) [resolution 20,26]
32. is_organic_compound(m) [resolution 31,19]
33. is_chemical_compound(m) [resolution 32,21]
34. $false [forward subsumption resolution 33,29]
% SZS output end Proof for hydrocarbon_premise_negative
% Termination reason: Refutation
